title: Add the apply command plumbing (additive)
description:
Add the `jit apply` command surface — argument parsing, dispatch, and result printing — as a purely additive command. The existing scaffold command keeps working and the scaffold is **not** flipped here, so this task leaves no broken intermediate.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] SCFA-01: `jit apply` is wired (parse, dispatch, print) and invokes the engine, with the existing scaffold command still fully working.
- [ ] [hard] SCFA-02: this task is purely additive — no existing behavior or default scaffold path changes.
- [ ] [hard] SCFA-03: the CLI accepts `<template> <container>` plus repeatable `--anchor role=id`, `--force`, and `--json`, per the approved contract.
- [ ] [hard] SCFA-04: `--json` emits a machine-readable apply result containing the template name, the resolved anchor bindings, and the created or refreshed node ids by role.
